title: Pocketnet Node Doctor — Canonical Manifest (v1)
description: Schema for the per-canonical manifest published by the pocketnet_create_checkpoint workflow. Conforming manifests are consumed by the pocketnet-node-doctor binary to authenticate canonicals (via the trust-root sidecar) and to fetch only differing chunks from the chunk store. format_version 1.
$comment: Canonical-form serialization rule (per pocketnet-node-doctor pre-spec Implementation Context): sorted JSON keys at every nesting level, no insignificant whitespace (no spaces between tokens, no trailing newline inside the serialized payload), UTF-8 byte output. The trust-root constant for a canonical is SHA-256(canonical_form_serialize(this manifest)) — externally published as the sidecar file 'trust-root.sha256' next to 'manifest.json'. The trust-root is NOT carried inside the manifest. Both the server-side manifest generator and the doctor-side plan-format library MUST serialize using this rule so the hashes are reproducible across implementations.

format_version.description: Schema format version. v1 of the manifest fixes this to integer 1. Future schema-incompatible changes increment this value.

block_height.description: Pocketnet block height the canonical was minted at.

pocketnet_core_version.description: Exact pocketnet-core version string the canonical was built against. The doctor refuses on local mismatch (FR-012).

created_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO-8601 timestamp in UTC. Used for the 30-day publication-freshness check (CR001-008).

entries.description: Per-file entries enumerating the canonical artifact set. Each element is one of two shapes selected by the entry_kind discriminator: 'sqlite_pages' for page-level (4 KB) addressing of SQLite-shaped artifacts, 'whole_file' for whole-file SHA-256 of non-SQLite artifacts.

trust_anchors.description: Reserved for v1.x+ trust anchors (third-party publishers, healthy-peer cross-check anchors, chain-anchored verification — see pre-spec FR-018). v1 publishes the empty array [].

entry_kind.description: Discriminator. Selects the page-level entry shape.

path.description: Forward-slash relative path rooted at the pocketnet data directory (e.g., 'pocketdb/main.sqlite3'). No leading slash, no '..' segments, ASCII-safe component names.

pages.description: Total page coverage of the canonical's file at the 4 KB SQLite page boundary. Sorted by offset ascending; offsets are contiguous multiples of 4096 covering the entire file.

offset.description: Byte offset of the page in the canonical file. Must be a non-negative multiple of 4096.

hash.description: SHA-256 of the page's uncompressed bytes, lowercase hex, no prefix.

change_counter.description: SQLite header change_counter value of the canonical's main.sqlite3. PERMITTED ONLY on the entry whose path is exactly 'pocketdb/main.sqlite3' — see allOf constraint below. Doctor's pre-flight ahead-of-canonical reference (pre-spec FR-011).

entry_kind.description: Discriminator. Selects the whole-file entry shape.

path.description: Forward-slash relative path rooted at the pocketnet data directory (e.g., 'blocks/000123.dat'). No leading slash, no '..' segments.

hash.description: SHA-256 of the file's uncompressed bytes, lowercase hex, no prefix.
